name: Adult Skyrim RPG
description:
If you have ever played Skyrim with those lewd loverslab mods installed, then you know what to expect. This is a text-based RPG taking place in Skyrim with heavy sexual overtones. It's dark and misogynist. Enjoy.

I haven't made an RPG bot in a long time, and while I was watching my character get her back blown out by a big ass orc, I had an idea. I debated getting rid of the items, gold, and HP, but I decided I like how it makes it kind of video gamey. Sometimes the bot doesn't track inventory correctly so just keep an eye on it, and make ample use of chat memory for long playthroughs.
creator: Story of Healing
